description_long: This object consists of a group of seven hot-air balloons, each featuring a large, rounded brown envelope and a rectangular basket suspended below by visible cables or ropes. The envelopes are smooth and solid in color, with no visible decorative patterns or markings. The baskets appear to be constructed from a wood-like material, with some showing slatted textures and others appearing more solid. Between the balloons, there are several flat, rectangular components that resemble platforms or possibly disassembled parts of the baskets. The burner frames are partially visible above some of the baskets, indicating the functional structure for heating the air inside the envelopes. The overall arrangement suggests a modular or display setup, with the balloons and components neatly aligned.
description: A group of seven brown hot-air balloons with visible baskets, suspension cables, and some burner frames, arranged alongside flat, platform-like components. The envelopes are solid brown and the baskets have a wood-like appearance.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the rounded brown envelopes and the flat, rectangular components laid out beside the balloons.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the alignment of the seven balloons, the baskets, and the suspension cables connecting the envelopes to the baskets.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backs of the envelopes and the arrangement of the baskets and flat components to the side.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view displaying the baskets, the underside of the envelopes, and the detailed layout of the flat components in front of the balloons.
attribute_envelope_pattern: The envelope is a solid brown color with no visible patterns, stripes, or decorative elements.
